scopeNotes: Adapt output to the configured niche prompt
Use the configured niche prompt as editorial context.
niche.editorialPrompt: This blog focuses on artificial intelligence from a practical and accessible perspective. It covers AI tools, real-world applications, emerging trends, and industry developments. Content is designed to help readers understand how AI is being used across different sectors, discover new tools, and explore practical ways to apply AI in everyday work and life. The tone is clear, engaging, and informative, similar to a modern tech and digital innovation magazine. The content is not focused on real-time breaking news, but rather on evergreen insights, trends, and practical knowledge.
